section_name: Use of Information Collected by Vendor
chapter_title: Denial of Renewal of License for Failure to Appear
text: Information collected under this chapter by a vendor may not be used by a person other than the department, the political subdivision, or a vendor as provided by this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 706. Denial of Renewal of License for Failure to Appear
##### § 706.010 — Use of Information Collected by Vendor

Information collected under this chapter by a vendor may not be used by a person other than the department, the political subdivision, or a vendor as provided by this chapter.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.161(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: Information collected under this chapter by a vendor may not be used by a person other than the department, the political subdivision, or a vendor as provided by this chapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.161(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
